name: Taffy Apple Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package, 20 oz refrigerated sugar cookie dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. Remove half a cup of cookie dough and reserve for another use.
3. Add flour to the remaining dough and knead with your hands to combine.
4. Press the dough into a 14-inch circle on a 15-inch baking stone.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cookie is lightly browned. Let cool for 10 minutes, then loosen from the stone.
6. Allow the cookie to cool completely.
7. In a bowl, blend together cream cheese, peanut butter, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
8. Spread the mixture evenly on the cooled cookie.
9. Peel, core, and slice the apples. Dip apple slices in lemon-lime soda to prevent browning.
10. Arrange apple slices on top of the cream cheese mixture.
11. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
12. Heat the caramel topping slightly and drizzle over the apples.
13. Sprinkle chopped peanuts over the pizza.
14. Cut and serve.
